message:
🌱 chore: add OCI manifest annotations for GHCR auto-linking (#701)

Add --annotation flags to docker buildx build commands in both
release workflows. For multi-arch images, Dockerfile LABELs only
apply to individual platform images — GHCR reads manifest index
annotations for auto-linking packages to repositories and
displaying metadata (description, license).

- Use github.server_url/github.repository for source annotation
  to avoid drift if the repo is renamed or forked
- Add permissions block to ci-release.yaml for least-privilege

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -7,6 +7,10 @@ on:
   release:
     types: [published]  # Also runs when a GitHub release is published
 
+permissions:
+  contents: read
+  packages: write
+
 jobs:
   docker-build-and-push:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
@@ -52,6 +56,9 @@ jobs:
           docker buildx build \
             --platform linux/amd64,linux/arm64 \
             --push \
+            --annotation "index:org.opencontainers.image.source=${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}" \
+            --annotation "index:org.opencontainers.image.description=Workload Variant Autoscaler (WVA) - GPU-aware autoscaler for LLM inference workloads" \
+            --annotation "index:org.opencontainers.image.licenses=Apache-2.0" \
             -t $IMAGE:$VERSION_TAG \
             -t $IMAGE:latest .

@@ -83,6 +83,9 @@ jobs:
           docker buildx build \
             --platform linux/amd64,linux/arm64 \
             --push \
+            --annotation "index:org.opencontainers.image.source=${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}" \
+            --annotation "index:org.opencontainers.image.description=Workload Variant Autoscaler (WVA) - GPU-aware autoscaler for LLM inference workloads" \
+            --annotation "index:org.opencontainers.image.licenses=Apache-2.0" \
             -t $IMAGE:$TAG \
             -t $IMAGE:latest .
